---
title: "setup_R Action"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{setup_R Action}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# `setup_R` Action

The `setup_R` action is usually called as first step in the workflows to set up
the R environment. It checks out the repository, sets up the R environment
according to the specified R version, installs the necessary dependencies, and
the package itself.

## Inputs

### Required Inputs

- `r-version`: The version of R to use. The value is passed to the
[r-lib/setup-r](https://github.com/r-lib/actions/tree/v2/setup-r) action (see
its documentation for permitted values). Default: `'release'`

- `http-user-agent`: The value is passed to the
[r-lib/setup-r](https://github.com/r-lib/actions/tree/v2/setup-r) action (see
its documentation for permitted values). Default: `'default'`

- `extra-packages`: Extra packages to install (in addition to the dependencies
of the package and the `remotes` and `yaml` package). A comma separated list is
expected. The value is passed to the
[r-lib/setup-r-dependencies](https://github.com/r-lib/actions/tree/v2/setup-r-dependencies)
action. Default: `''`

### Optional Inputs

- `install-package`: Should the package be installed? Default: `false`

## Additional Requirements

The action expects the file `staged_dependencies.yaml` to be present in the root
of the repository. It defines the upstream dependencies of the package. For
example:
```
upstream_repos:
- repo: pharmaverse/pharmaversesdtm
  host: https://github.com
- repo: pharmaverse/admiraldev
  host: https://github.com
```
For upstream dependencies the current development version will be installed,
except for releases and patch releases.

## Action Structure

The following steps are performed:

1. **Checkout repository**: Checks out the repository using the
`actions/checkout` action.
2. **Set up R**: Sets up the R environment using the `r-lib/setup-r` action with
the specified R version and HTTP user agent.
3. **Install dependencies**: Installs the package dependencies using the
`r-lib/setup-r-dependencies` action, including any extra packages specified in
the inputs.
1. **Install Development Versions of Upstream Dependencies**: Installs the
development versions of upstream dependencies defined in the
`staged_dependencies.yaml` file, except for releases (`[skip vbump]` in the
title of the merge request) and patch releases (merge requests with target
`patch`).
4. **Install package**: If the `install-package` input is set to `true`, the
package itself is installed using the `remotes::install_local()` function.
